title: Gnarly by design: building systems with grit
speakers: Beau Wingfield (Visual Product Designer, ex-EA, Full Circle Studio (skate.), Publix)
key_points: Beau Wingfield explores how to build gritty, texture-heavy design systems, which he frames as even harder to create than clean design systems.
The talk centers on a real video game design system as a case study for the journey.
It covers techniques for adding character and texture to an otherwise squeaky-clean design system.
A key focus is making such a character-rich, texture-heavy system scalable.
